info.title: Sky Panel BFF Service APIs
info.description: Backend for Frontend service for Sky Panel. You should fill the JWT token to authorize the requests.

tags.name: Wagoria Risk
tags.description: Risk Check, Alert, Market Risk, Combination Risk Management

get.summary: ID ile risk kategorisi detayi (limitleri dahil)

parameters.name: marketId
parameters.description: Market definition id (filters list; invalid values are ignored)

get.description:
Retrieve a specific resource by its ID

Required permissions: RESOURCE:READ

put.description:
Update a resource by its ID

Required permissions: RESOURCE:EDIT

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sıralama alanı. Whitelist dışı → createdAt DESC default.

parameters.description: Sıralama alanı. Whitelist dışı → createdAt DESC default.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sıralama alanı. Whitelist dışı → updatedAt DESC default.

get.summary: Tipe gore risk kategorilerini listele (PLAYER, RETAILER, MARKET, ACCUMULATOR)
Bayi risk detayi + RITA master data (name + composed address)

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sıralama alanı. Whitelist dışı → createdAt DESC default.

get.summary: Paginated market risk listesi (risk data + tradoria metadata)

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sıralama alanı. Whitelist dışı → totalTakeout DESC default.

get.summary: Market risk ozet bilgisi (risk data + tradoria metadata)
Market'e bahis alan tum bayilerin aggregate listesi + market context (breadcrumb, event, kategori)

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sıralama alanı. Whitelist dışı → totalStake DESC default.

get.summary: Market'e oynayan tum oyuncularin aggregate listesi + market context (breadcrumb, event, kategori)

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sıralama alanı. Whitelist dışı → totalStake DESC default.

get.summary: Retailer Combination Takeout — combination'in bayi bazli dagilimi (V026)
get.description:
Bu combination'in her bayi uzerinden sales count, stake, takeout, bracket bazli per-retailer limit, ratio %, rejection sayisi + RITA retailerName/retailerAddress enrichment.

Required permissions: RISK_COMBINATION:READ

get.summary: Combination icindeki marketlerin tek tek risk metrikleri (V025)
get.description:
Combination expand satirinin lazy-load endpoint'i. Backend yalin marketId doner; BFF MarketRiskEnrichmentService ile name/event/sport metadata'sini ekler.

Required permissions: RISK_COMBINATION:READ

V026: ?status=ACTIVE|CLOSED|ALL ile filtrelenebilir. Verilmezse default ACTIVE. Eski ?includeClosed=true|false geriye uyumlu.

Required permissions: RISK_COMBINATION:READ

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sıralama alanı. Whitelist dışı → totalTakeout DESC default.

get.summary: Renk paleti (player ve retailer icin ortak combobox listesi)

get.description:
playerId/retailerId/marketId shorthand'leri mutually exclusive — risk-service tarafinda riskType + entityId AND'lemesine resolve edilir

Required permissions: RISK_ALERT:READ

parameters.name: displayMode
parameters.description: Görüntü modu: ALL veya LAST (her scope için en yeni alarm)

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sıralama alanı. Whitelist dışı → createdAt DESC default.

parameters.description: Sıralama alanı. Whitelist dışı → createdAt DESC default.

get.description:
playerId/retailerId/marketId shorthand'leri mutually exclusive

Required permissions: RISK_ALERT:READ

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status filter: ACKNOWLEDGED veya RESOLVED. Verilmezse her ikisi gelir. ACTIVE kabul edilmez.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sıralama alanı. Whitelist dışı → updatedAt DESC default (history için).

get.summary: Get role permissions from cache by role name
get.description:
Get permissions for a specific role from Redis cache by role name

Required permissions: PERMISSION:READ (AND) ROLE:READ

Get resources with permissions for a specific role with pagination support. Multiple actions can be specified for filtering.

Required permissions: PERMISSION:READ (AND) ROLE:READ

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action types to filter by (can specify multiple)

get.summary: Get role permissions with pagination and search by role id
get.description:
Get permissions for a specific role with pagination support and optional search filtering by resource name and action. Multiple actions can be specified for OR logic filtering.

Required permissions: PERMISSION:READ (AND) ROLE:READ

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action types to filter by (can specify multiple)

get.description:
Get all resources with their actions and mark existing permissions for a role. Used for role permission assignment UI.

Required permissions: PERMISSION:READ (AND) ROLE:READ

get.summary: Get role details with parsed permissions
get.description:
Get role details and permissions with parsed resource names and actions. Multiple actions can be specified for filtering.

Required permissions: PERMISSION:READ (AND) ROLE:READ

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action types to filter by (can specify multiple)
